name: NYC VR Travel Liberty Island & Boat Trip

reviews.review_description:
Tour is ok but we have year 2025, quality of video is very poor.Too much compression of video,glitches...And problem is not in  my internet connection because i reach over wifi 492 mBit pro second.Please,when you do next time video,pls 2k resolution or 
minimum Full hd.Thanks

Last time I have taken the Statue of Liberty Express Tour was back in 2016. It is a nice experience to take the same tour from home and be remebered of the great setting, New York's #1 tourist destination
